subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto her who hath drawn nigh unto the Ocean and hath attained the triumph of God, the Mighty, the Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا للتی اقبلت الی البحر و فازت بفوز الله العزیز الکریم ان
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @firmness in the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
